expected_to_work_for: iGPU: gfx1151 (Strix Halo), gfx1103 (Phoenix/Rembrandt), gfx1035 (Van Gogh)
dGPU: gfx1100/1101/1102 (RDNA 3, Navi 3x), gfx1200/1201 (RDNA 4) -- check HIP SDK version

highlights: New diagnose-connection.ps1: 6-layer read-only transport diagnostic (form factor, USB4/TB4, PCIe, AMD driver, HIP runtime, rocm-smi). Auto-invoked by validate.ps1 on any dGPU failure.
New dgpu-probe.ps1: finer-grained PnP probe for the dGPU, ASMedia dock routers, USB4 audio, and recent events.
validate.ps1 now auto-invokes diagnose-connection.ps1 on any dGPU-side failure (hipInfo 0 devices, or vector_add compile/run exception) so the user gets a per-layer verdict without a second command.

Bug fixes in diagnose-connection.ps1: PCIe layer now correctly reports OK on a single healthy dGPU; USB4 layer distinguishes host-controller failures (FAIL) from downstream-only degradation (WARN); hipInfo Test-Path no longer chokes on null.
AGENTS.md and SKILL.md updated with the new diagnose entry point and decision-tree step 7.
Initial verified-hardware release. Strix Halo iGPU (gfx1151) + RX 7900 XTX dGPU (gfx1100) end-to-end: 26/26 rocm-sdk test on iGPU venv, vector_add PASS on dGPU HIP SDK.

trademarks.disclaimer: This kit is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
